2025JUL02 Board Meeting Minutes:

Old Business:

Dumpster: No further acute issues; no change in status.
Completed Workshops:
Basket Weaving:
9 sign-ups, out of 30 max
To improve: push out more promotion earlier
Registration management software: Hi-Events, Alf.io - Kevin and/or Calob to MVP both
Prospective Workshops:
3D printing:
Instructors: Adam Nuwer, Isaac
Topic: Information on electrical and mechanical technology, and 3D-printing workflow, not 3D-modelling.
Tentative timing: Sat. July 26, 2025
Tentative duration: 6-8 hours
Tentative cost: 35 member/50 non-member
Tentative headcount: 12
Announcement e-mail+Slack: Adam N. to send
Woodworking:
Instructors: Pete K. and Elliott S. - in development
ADSB:
Instructors: Kevin R. - in development
Internet Service:
Gigabit still fallow, negotiations ongoing with Comcast for rate reduction - Kevin R. to address.
Mid-Year Financial Report:
Available at: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jLrsP7jGN1PXVpmos-R_1Z4GKEMkvSg2AGoC9QmEg4A/edit?tab=t.0
Financial Report accepted.

New Business:

BARC support:
Donate 4 old laptops to the Bloomington Area Radio Club for monthly online HAM radio license testing. - Kevin R. to address.
Financial Report Action Items:
7 additional members (mixed voting and hardship) required for approximate budget breakeven - targeting 60 member.
More workshops - see above.
Discuss the prospect of raising dues at next Board Meeting.

Next Board Meeting: WED, 2025AUG06 @6PM
